response.original_title: [[24/7 Help Terms]]  How to reset 2FA on Uphold?
response.overview: To reset 2FA on Uphold, you must use the account recovery process and complete identity verification before your old authenticator is removed and a new one can be set ✓《1⇝888✩574✩7167》. Uphold requires this security step to prevent unauthorized access, especially if you lose your phone, authenticator app, or login device ☎【1➱888✩574✩7167】. Go to the Uphold login page and click “Trouble logging in” or “Account recovery” to begin the reset process ✓《1⇝888✩574✩7167》. Start account recovery from the login page ☎【1➱888✩574✩7167】.  Enter your registered email and submit identity verification details ✓《1⇝888✩574✩7167》.  Upload valid proof of identity as requested by Uphold ☎【1➱888✩574✩7167】.  Wait for Uphold’s security team to review and approve your request ✓《1⇝888✩574✩7167》.  After approval, your 2FA is reset and you can log in again ☎【1➱888✩574✩7167】.  Set up a new authenticator app (like Google Authenticator) to secure your account ✓《1⇝888✩574✩7167》.
response.title: [[24/7 Help Terms]]  How to reset 2FA on Uphold?
